title: Tunisian Red Tagine with Iced Onions
description: A fusion of Indian and Tunisian flavors, this dish combines the sweetness of onions with the spices of a traditional tagine.
instructions: Heat 2 tbsp oil in a large tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the sliced onions and cook until they start to brown, about 8 minutes.
Add the tunisian spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped vegetables, iced water, and salt to taste.
Bring to a simmer, then reduce heat to low and cook covered for 20 minutes.
Garnish with crisp cilantro and serve over rice or with naan bread.
